creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: lippe
Date: Mon Sep  2 15:35:16 2013
New Revision: 326012
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/326012

Log:
  - Fix plist
  - Insert PORTSCOUT
  
  PR:		ports/180264
  Submitted by:	Danilo Egea Gondolfo <danilogondolfo@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/lang/yap/Makefile
  head/lang/yap/pkg-plist

Modified: head/lang/yap/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/yap/Makefile	Mon Sep  2 15:26:23 2013	(r326011)
+++ head/lang/yap/Makefile	Mon Sep  2 15:35:16 2013	(r326012)
@@ -9,6 +9,8 @@ MASTER_SITES=	http://www.dcc.fc.up.pt/~v
 MAINTAINER=	danilogondolfo@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	High-performance Prolog compiler
 
+PORTSCOUT=	limit:^6\.2\.
+
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
 
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
@@ -26,6 +28,7 @@ USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--enable-max-performance
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
+MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
 
 DOCSDIR=	${PREFIX}/share/doc/Yap
 DATADIR=	${PREFIX}/share/Yap

Modified: head/lang/yap/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
